creator: juraj@bednar.sk
text:
The Slovak (sk_SK) locale is missing.

Fix: 

The fix is easy, since everything but the time
definition is the same as in cs_CZ locale. We use the same norm
for sorting, etc. So link everything to the czech locale.
Timedef can be found here:

http://juraj.bednar.sk/work/software/i18n/sk_SK.ISO_8859-2.src.timedef
